entities.name: WILD SORGHUM
entities.description: Wild populations of Sorghum bicolor (L.) Moench ssp. verticilliflorum (Steud.) De Wet

entities.name: KENYA
entities.description: Country where the wild sorghum populations were studied

entities.name: NWWSP
entities.description: North-West wild sorghum population in Kenya

entities.name: SEWSP
entities.description: South-East wild sorghum population in Kenya

entities.name: MICROSATELLITE MARKERS
entities.description: 18 markers used to investigate genetic diversity and bottlenecks

entities.name: MICROSATELLITE ANALYSIS
entities.description: Method used to analyze allelic diversity and heterozygosity

entities.name: POPULATION BOTTLENECK
entities.description: A severe reduction in population size that can lead to genetic erosion

entities.name: GENETIC EROSION
entities.description: Loss of genetic diversity due to population size reduction

entities.name: ALLELIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The number of alleles per locus in a population

entities.name: OBSERVED HETEROZYGOSITY
entities.description: The proportion of individuals that are heterozygous at a given locus

entities.name: EFFECTIVE POPULATION SIZE
entities.description: The size of an ideal population that would show the same amount of genetic drift as the population being studied

entities.name: INFINITE ALLELE MODEL
entities.description: A model used to estimate effective population size

entities.name: STEPWISE MUTATION MODEL
entities.description: A model used to estimate effective population size

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The total genetic diversity within a population

entities.name: TEST OF HETEROZYGOSITY EXCESS
entities.description: A test used to detect recent population bottlenecks

entities.name: ANALYSIS OF ALLELE FREQUENCY DISTRIBUTION
entities.description: A method to identify L-shaped distributions to detect bottlenecks

entities.name: L-SHAPED DISTRIBUTION
entities.description: A specific allele frequency distribution indicating no recent bottleneck

entities.name: HETEROZYGOSITY DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A state where observed heterozygosity is lower than expected

entities.name: POPULATION SUBDIVISION
entities.description: The division of a population into smaller, isolated groups

entities.name: MIXED MATING SYSTEM
entities.description: A reproductive system combining different mating types

entities.name: HISTORICAL EXPANSION
entities.description: The growth of a population over a long period

entities.name: NULL ALLELES
entities.description: Alleles that cannot be amplified by PCR and are not detected

entities.name: ECO-GEOGRAPHICAL CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental and geographical factors affecting the populations
